heading: Definitions
label: 17101 Definitions
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)1710140:703., , .Pub. L. 88–515, § 378 Stat. 696Aug. 30, 1964In clause (1), the words “the legislative, executive, and judicial branches of the Government of the United States” are omitted as unnecessary.

L. 88–515, § 378 Stat. 696Aug. 30, 1964In clause (1), the words “the legislative, executive, and judicial branches of the Government of the United States” are omitted as unnecessary.

children.heading: .—Federal government
children.label: 1 .—Federal government
children.text: The term “Federal Government” includes the government of the District of Columbia.

children.heading: .—Motor vehicle
children.label: 2 .—Motor vehicle
children.text: The term “motor vehicle” means a vehicle, self-propelled or drawn by mechanical power, designed for use on the highways principally for the transportation of passengers, except a vehicle designed or used for military field training, combat, or tactical purposes.
